title: Harris Essentials Walls & Ceilings and Woodwork 10 Pack, 0, 1 x 1.5, 1 x 2 Gloss 1 x 0.5, 1 x 1, 2 x 1.5, 2X 2 Emulsion Paint Brushes
features: 10-pack brush set for use with emulsion and gloss paints
Ideal for painting walls, ceilings, and interior woodwork
Comfortable handles for easy grip during long decorating sessions
Range of brush sizes for versatile painting options
description: From the manufacturer Choosing The Right Harris Product For Your Decorating Task Has Never Been Easier At Harris, our mission is to share our knowledge to give you the confidence you need to succeed in your decorating projects. That means listening, learning, creating, improving and innovating to make your product choice easier and more enjoyable. We've specially developed our new product range for DIY decorators. The success of Harris products has always been down to how we continually develop to meet your needs, so we’ve grouped, and colour coded our products by traditional DIY tasks. Our customers are always at the heart of everything we do! Harris Essentials Walls & Ceilings and Woodwork Gloss Paint Brush Multi-Pack Contents 1 x 0.5" Walls & Ceilings Brush 1 x 1" Walls & Ceilings Brush 2 x 1.5" Walls & Ceilings brushes 2 x 2" Walls & Ceilings brushes 1 x 0.5" Gloss brush 1 x 1" Gloss brush 1 x 1.5" Gloss brush 1 x 2" Gloss brush Use for painting smaller walls & ceilings and interior woodwork areas All the paint brushes you need for painting smaller areas on walls & ceilings as well as interior woodwork. The pack includes 4 different paint brush sizes, perfect for cutting in around light switches, plug sockets and along skirting boards. The silver tipped brushes are for use with emulsion paints & the black head brushes are used with gloss paints. The brushes offer good paint pick and finish. Doing a Painting Project Don't forget to team your Essentials paint brushes with the Essentials 9" Walls & Ceilings Roller Set and the Essentials 4" Gloss & Emulsion Roller Set! Three Quality Levels To Choose From Harris Essentials Painting & Decorating Tools Range The Essentials range is a straightforward selection of basic yet reliable decorating and painting tools, that help you get those painting jobs done in a quick & easy way. Offers good value for money and gives you all the decorating and painting tools you need when on a budget. Harris Seriously Good Painting & Decorating Tools Range Seriously Good is our mid-range of decorating and painting tools, offering quality paint brushes, paint rollers and decorating and painting tools that perform well without too much effort. Harris Ultimate Painting & Decorating Tools Range Superior in quality, look and feel, the Ultimate range is our best decorating and painting tools range. It combines innovative materials so the paint brushes and paint rollers give an excellent paint finish whilst making your decorating task easier.
